heroInsight: Carousels are dominating with an 80% format share and leading engagement, with an average engagement score of 98, driven by their 2.5x better save rates and DM shares.

formatPerformance.summary: Carousels are the clear winners, driving significant engagement due to their ability to tell a story over multiple slides, encouraging saves and shares. Static posts, while less engaging, still maintain relevance.

data.name: Reel
data.note: Reels remain critical for reach due to high retention of the first 3 seconds, essential in 2026.

data.name: Carousel
data.note: Massive engagement due to storytelling and save potential.

data.name: Story
data.note: Stories drive engagement through frequent updates and interaction features like polls.

data.name: Static
data.note: Less engagement compared to carousels but useful for quick updates.

critical: DM shares = 3-5x more valuable than likes
First 3 seconds retention = everything for Reels
Originality score: 10+ reposts in 30 days = shadowbanned
Raw, real human content > polished AI-generated
proTips: Post carousel content at 6-7AM — 40% higher save rates in gym demographic
Use 'save this' CTAs in slide 3-4 of carousels — drives collection adds
Engage with niche fitness communities — higher DM share rate
Optimize for first 3 seconds in Reels — use quick cuts and engaging hooks
Leverage trending audio in Reels — boosts discoverability via audio search

incoming.eta: Likely to hit IG in 1-2 weeks

hotPosts.caption:
arnold 2026 ⭐️👮🏼 what a time !!!

full fit @tlfapparel cxde “TLF-KENNEDY” 😚

#fitness #gymtok #fittok #gymgirl #fitgirl
hotPosts.whyViral: This post showcases a full fit check with TLF Apparel, highlighting a brand collaboration that resonates with the fitness community. The use of a personal discount code encourages engagement and potential sales.
hotPosts.takeaway: Incorporate brand collaborations into your content and offer exclusive discount codes to drive engagement and sales.

hotPosts.caption:
67/66 ( arm day ) 
final post of the @gymshark challenge #gymshark66 , gonna say thank you for that challenge this 66 great and consistent days.( no skip lift , all was done. )
l was happy to take the
hotPosts.whyViral: This post is the final entry of a Gymshark challenge, which creates a sense of completion and community involvement. The consistent posting over 66 days likely built a loyal audience.
hotPosts.takeaway: Participate in and document long-term challenges to engage your audience and build community.
